author: doll-agent
content: Implemented SFC64 BitGenerator in ferray-random::bitgen::sfc64. Sebastian Vigna's 4-word Small Fast Counting generator. Period >= 2^64 (typical 2^255). seed_from_u64 sets a=b=c=seed, counter=1, then advances 12 times to warm up — exactly matches NumPy's reference. Re-exported as ferray_random::Sfc64. 3 unit tests.
